JHU Software Concepts Module 4

  • View page source

pull_new_data module

Pull additional GradCafe applicant records and update PostgreSQL.

This module scrapes new GradCafe pages, cleans the records, saves intermediate JSON files, and inserts new records into the applicants database while avoiding duplicates.

src.pull_new_data.get_start_page()

Calculate the GradCafe page number used as the starting point for incremental scraping.

Returns:

Starting page number.

Return type:

int

src.pull_new_data.insert_records_into_database(records)

Insert new applicant records into PostgreSQL.

Parameters:

records (list) – Cleaned applicant records.

Returns:

(inserted_count, skipped_count)

Return type:

tuple

src.pull_new_data.main()

Execute the complete data pull workflow.

The workflow: 1. Scrapes new records. 2. Saves raw JSON. 3. Cleans records. 4. Saves cleaned JSON. 5. Inserts records into PostgreSQL.

src.pull_new_data.save_json(data, filename)
src.pull_new_data.scrape_new_records()

Scrape approximately 500 new GradCafe records.

Returns:

List of cleaned applicant records.

Return type:

list

src.pull_new_data.to_float(value)
src.pull_new_data.to_int(value)
